title: Niš, Nišava — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Niš, Nišava: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Niš is a city in Nišava with a population of 260,000. The third-largest city in Serbia, a historic crossroads known for the Niš Fortress, Skull Tower, and its growing tech industry.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
